channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18513] sanity test_411b: osd-zfs backend panic for sync
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b38c0deb-7821-457e-9ec6-c867766ae624

test_411b failed with the following error:

trevis-27vm3 crashed during sanity test_411b
[24519.160594] Pid: 688495, comm: ll_ost_io00_028 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1 SMP Wed Nov 13 21:04:25 UTC 2024
[24519.160593] Lustre: ll_ost_io00_027: service thread pid 688494 was inactive for 41.004 seconds. The thread might be hung, or it might only be slow and will resume later. Dumping the stack trace for debugging purposes:
[24519.160600] Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message
[24519.167402] Call Trace TBD:
[24519.168230] [<0>] cv_wait_common+0xaf/0x130 [spl]
[24519.169258] [<0>] txg_wait_synced_impl+0xc6/0x110 [zfs]
[24519.170808] [<0>] txg_wait_synced+0xc/0x40 [zfs]
[24519.171826] [<0>] dmu_tx_wait+0x1e4/0x3f0 [zfs]
[24519.172828] [<0>] dmu_tx_assign+0x157/0x4d0 [zfs]
[24519.173859] [<0>] osd_trans_start+0xb8/0x450 [osd_zfs]
[24519.174964] [<0>] ofd_write_attr_set+0x18c/0x1000 [ofd]
[24519.176072] [<0>] ofd_commitrw_write+0x200/0x1b00 [ofd]
[24519.177121] [<0>] ofd_commitrw+0x5dc/0xd80 [ofd]
[24519.178063] [<0>] obd_commitrw+0x1b6/0x370 [ptlrpc]
[24519.179628] [<0>] tgt_brw_write+0xf54/0x1f90 [ptlrpc]
[24519.180728] [<0>] tgt_request_handle+0x3f4/0x1a30 [ptlrpc]
[24519.181903] [<0>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x2aa/0xcf0 [ptlrpc]
[24519.183202] [<0>] ptlrpc_main+0xc9e/0x15c0 [ptlrpc]
[24519.184255] [<0>] kthread+0x134/0x150
[24519.185053] [<0>] ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40
[24519.185904] Pid: 688494, comm: ll_ost_io00_027 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1 SMP Wed Nov 13 21:04:25 UTC 2024
[24519.199111] Call Trace TBD:
[24519.199797] [<0>] cv_wait_common+0xaf/0x130 [spl]
[24519.200761] [<0>] txg_wait_synced_impl+0xc6/0x110 [zfs]
[24519.201911] [<0>] txg_wait_synced+0xc/0x40 [zfs]
[24519.202930] [<0>] dmu_tx_wait+0x1e4/0x3f0 [zfs]
[24519.203917] [<0>] dmu_tx_assign+0x157/0x4d0 [zfs]
[24519.204962] [<0>] osd_trans_start+0xb8/0x450 [osd_zfs]
[24519.206082] [<0>] ofd_write_attr_set+0x18c/0x1000 [ofd]
[24519.207142] [<0>] ofd_commitrw_write+0x200/0x1b00 [ofd]
[24519.208202] [<0>] ofd_commitrw+0x5dc/0xd80 [ofd]
[24519.209132] [<0>] obd_commitrw+0x1b6/0x370 [ptlrpc]
[24519.210667] [<0>] tgt_brw_write+0xf54/0x1f90 [ptlrpc]
[24519.211779] [<0>] tgt_request_handle+0x3f4/0x1a30 [ptlrpc]
[24519.213023] [<0>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x2aa/0xcf0 [ptlrpc]
[24519.214354] [<0>] ptlrpc_main+0xc9e/0x15c0 [ptlrpc]
[24519.215412] [<0>] kthread+0x134/0x150
[24519.216182] [<0>] ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/109377 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/109377 - 4.18.0-553.16.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_411b - trevis-27vm3 crashed during sanity test_411b
item.summary: sanity test_411b: osd-zfs backend panic for sync

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
I see something similar for OST node, https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/9509f0f9-aa54-411e-a021-390fc9ea95da
I have not found IO errors, also OST0004

Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: INFO: task dp_sync_taskq:126253 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:       Tainted: P           OE     -------- -  - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: task:dp_sync_taskq   state:D stack:0     pid:126253 ppid:2      flags:0x80004080
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: Call Trace:
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  __schedule+0x2d1/0x870
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  schedule+0x55/0xf0
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  spl_panic+0xe6/0xe8 [spl]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? metaslab_free_impl+0xac/0xe0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? _cond_resched+0x15/0x30
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? mutex_lock+0xe/0x30
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? dmu_buf_will_dirty_impl+0x12f/0x180 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? _cond_resched+0x15/0x30
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? mutex_lock+0xe/0x30
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? dsl_dir_diduse_transfer_space+0xea/0x120 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? dsl_bookmark_block_killed+0x28/0x1f0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  free_children+0x38f/0x3d0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  free_children+0x217/0x3d0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  free_children+0x217/0x3d0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  dnode_sync_free_range+0x11c/0x270 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? dnode_undirty_dbufs+0x1d0/0x1d0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  range_tree_walk+0x107/0x1d0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  dnode_sync+0x249/0xa30 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? __switch_to_asm+0x43/0x80
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? finish_task_switch+0x86/0x2f0
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? _cond_resched+0x15/0x30
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  sync_dnodes_task+0x71/0xa0 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  taskq_thread+0x2e1/0x510 [spl]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? wake_up_q+0x60/0x60
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  ? taskq_thread_spawn+0x50/0x50 [spl]
Dec 10 14:17:45 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel:  kthread+0x134/0x150

Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: Lustre: ll_ost_io00_006: service thread pid 163912 was inactive for 72.148 seconds. The thread might be hung, or it might only be slow and will resume later. Dumping the stack trace for debugging purposes:
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: Pid: 190464, comm: ll_ost_io00_012 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1 SMP Mon Nov 18 21:14:09 UTC 2024
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: Call Trace TBD:
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] cv_wait_common+0xaf/0x130 [spl]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] txg_wait_synced_impl+0xc6/0x110 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] txg_wait_synced+0xc/0x40 [zfs]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] osd_trans_stop+0x515/0x550 [osd_zfs]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] ofd_commitrw_write+0xbfa/0x1b00 [ofd]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] ofd_commitrw+0x5dc/0xd80 [ofd]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] obd_commitrw+0x1b6/0x370 [ptlrpc]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] tgt_brw_write+0xf54/0x1f90 [ptlrpc]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] tgt_request_handle+0x3f4/0x1a30 [ptlrpc]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x2aa/0xcf0 [ptlrpc]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] ptlrpc_main+0xc9e/0x15c0 [ptlrpc]
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] kthread+0x134/0x150
Dec 10 14:25:28 onyx-108vm6.onyx.whamcloud.com kernel: [<0>] ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40

the log is full of IO errors:

[24628.663426] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev vda, sector 104408022 op 0x1:(WRITE) flags 0x700 phys_seg 1 prio class 0
[24628.701058] zio pool=lustre-ost4 vdev=/dev/vg_Role_OSS/ost4 error=5 type=2 offset=3287788544 size=512 flags=184880
